title: 10 Mini Teddy Bears, Tiny Teddy Bears Keychain, Mini Plushies for DIY Craft Projects, Holiday Decorations and Party Favors, Small Teddy Bear Keyring Gift
features: Premium Material:The mini teddy bears Made from high-quality, these mini teddy bears are soft to the touch; The durable construction ensures they maintain their shape and vibrant colors even with frequent use; Ideal for kids and craft enthusiasts

Versatile Use:The tiny teddy bears Perfect for DIY craft projects, holiday decorations, and party favors; Each small teddy bear comes with a keyring for easy attachment to bags, backpacks, or keychains;
Adorable Design: Features cute mini plushies with charming expressions; The tiny teddy bears are lightweight and easy to carry, making them great companions for kids and gift givers alike

Great Gift Idea: These mini teddy bears make thoughtful gifts for birthdays, holidays, and most occasions; The 10 pcs teddy keyring ensures plenty to share with friends and family; Suitable for various celebrations and events
Safe and Fun:The small teddy bear Designed with safety in mind, these small teddy bears are perfect for kid; The soft material and secure keyring make them both fun and practical for everyday use
